Aug 18th

Frameworks, Libraries and Tools

CMS

  • Awesome-CMS-Corestars388 - Awesome CMS Core is an open source CMS built using ASP.Net Core & ReactJS with module separation concern in mind and provide lastest trend of technology

  • Umbracostars3.7k - An extensible and friendly Open source ASP.NET Core CMS

  • Silverbackstars162 - Framework to build event-driven applications (support for Kafka, RabbitMQ, MQTT).

    • Jul 15th, 2021

    Networking

  • SharpPcapstars967 - Fully managed, cross platform (Windows, Mac, Linux) .NET library for capturing packets from live and file based devices.

    Misc

  • Downloaderstars574 - Downloader is a modern, fluent, asynchronous, testable and portable library for .NET. This is a multipart downloader with asynchronous progress events.

    • Jun 27th, 2021

    Misc

  • Dotnet outdatedstars645 - A .NET Core global tool to display and update outdated NuGet packages in a project

  • SmartCodestars526 – SmartCode= IDataSource -> IBuildTask -> IOutput => Build Everything!!! (Including [Code generator])

    • Apr 28th, 2021

    Tools

  • Typinstars202 - Simple to use declarative framework for interactive CLI applications and command line tools (direct mode) that has its roots in CliFx.

    Frameworks, Libraries and Tools

    Office

  • EPPlusstars1.3k - Create advanced Excel spreadsheets using .NET.

    • Jul 23rd, 2020

    Frameworks, Libraries and Tools

    Application Templates

  • CleanArchitecturestars11.2k - A starting point for Clean Architecture with ASP.NET Core. Clean Architecture is just the latest in a series of names for the same loosely-coupled, dependency-inverted architecture. You will also find it named hexagonal, ports-and-adapters, or onion architecture.
  • CleanArchitecture (SPA)stars9.9k - Solution template for creating a Single Page App (SPA) with Angular 8 and ASP.NET Core 3 following the principles of Clean Architecture

    • Apr 6th, 2020

    Frameworks, Libraries and Tools

  • EasyNetQstars2.5k - An easy to use .NET API for RabbitMQ.

    • Mar 13th, 2020

    Logging

  • NLogstars5.6k - Advanced .NET, Silverlight and Xamarin Logging with support for structured and non structured logging.
    • NLog for ASP.NET and ASP.NET Corestars288 - NLog integration for ASP.NET & ASP.NET Core 1-3
    • NLog.Extensions.Loggingstars356 - NLog Provider for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging for .NET Standard libraries and .NET Core applications
    • NLog.Windows.Formsstars41 - NLog targets specific for Windows.Forms
    • NLog.MailKitstars11 - Alternative Mail target using the using MailKit library

    • Mar 7th, 2020

  • Unitystars1.6k - A lightweight, extensible dependency injection container.

  • SapphireDbstars393 - Server implementation of SapphireDb, a framework for easy development of applications with realtime data synchronization and a self hosted alternative to firebase realtime database/firestore for asp.net core and ef core. Check out the documentation for more details: Documentation
